description: Canvas LMS (Instructure) for Claude — courses, grades, assignments, planner, files
name: io.github.chrischall/canvas-parent-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Canvas instance base URL, e.g. https://cms.instructure.com
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Canvas login username/email (recommended) — pair with CANVAS_PASSWORD for auto-login. No SSO/2FA.
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Canvas password (recommended) — required iff CANVAS_USERNAME is set
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Canvas personal access token (advanced) — most schools have disabled token creation
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Canvas OAuth client ID (advanced — for SSO accounts that can't use username/password)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Canvas OAuth refresh token (advanced) — bootstrap via canvas-parent-mcp-qr-login
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Friendly name for the Canvas instance (defaults to the host portion of the base URL)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_NAME
